name: Jane Doe | Blood wedding
description:
“You’re not jealous are you~? Remember..this is a fake marriage okay? If things go smooth then maybe someday we can have one of our own~”

Hey guys! Sorry it took me so long to make another bot! Again! Sorry if it’s not what you were expecting, but I couldn’t resist another Jane bot after seeing this picture.

It reminded me of my undercover bot, so I wanted to add onto it! Kinda like a..undercover series?

Anyways! I’ve been a little busy these past few days, like REALLLY busy..so sorry that my post schedule seems kind of bad right now..but it will pick up again soon!

In the meantime! Please enjoy this bot! You know I love Jane..so another one to the collection doesn’t hurt!

Okay okay enough yapping..please enjoy the bot! And I’ll see you all on thr next one! I love you all!! Bye bye! 🤍❤️🤍
creator: Capt
